page: Microsoft Azure HB120-16rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance within the HBv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. This configuration features an Intel processor with 16 dedicated vCPUs and a total memory capacity of 456.0 GB, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 28.5 GB per core. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention.

The instance is equipped with 2412 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. For high-speed interconnectivity and clustered workloads, the server is RDMA capable. It does not include any graphics processing units, making it a CPU-only deployment option.

Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 28.5 GB per core, this instance offers high resource density for memory-bound tasks, providing qualitative cost efficiency by reducing the need to scale out compute resources solely to acquire more memory. The combination of dedicated compute cores, large memory capacity, local storage, and RDMA capability makes this server suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database management, and clustered scientific simulations.
description: Microsoft Azure HB120-16rs_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server instance in the HBv3 family, operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an Intel processor with 16 dedicated vCPUs and 456.0 GB of memory, resulting in a high memory-to-core ratio of 28.5 GB per core. The server is equipped with 2412 GB of local storage, supports Premium Storage, and is RDMA capable for high-speed networking. It does not contain any GPUs. This hardware profile provides high memory density relative to the compute core count, offering qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound tasks by reducing the need to scale out compute resources solely for memory capacity. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention. The instance is suited for memory-intensive applications, database workloads, and clustered simulations requiring RDMA support.
